Great fun accident work out game with twist on bowling, tennis, and baseball!

I love playing this game! It reminds me of Wii sports, which I also love playing. I wish there were more online players because I can not find people to play with.  Come on people, let's play Sports Scramble!!!!

No matter how you play even if your playing perfectly the cpu will still end up beating you. An example is in baseball they will hit your shots no matter how you throw it, causing you to not being able to have anything to help you and result in losing, it's also the same in the other sports.

For some reason it took my review off there I guess because I uninstalled the game due to how bad it sucks. The bowling ball doesn't spin like it's supposed to. It goes the opposite direction of what I am spending every time pretty much. Baseball challenge keeps you from grabbing the ball out of the glove until the gold squares disappear or the ball just disappears out of the glove after you've caught it. May be the worst game I played on VR yet. Swing and a miss

This game is NOT multiplayer as advertised. Multiplayer has NOT worked once since the inception of this game. The option is there, but all friends show as offline. Oculus knows about the issue and refuses to fix it. Do not waste your time or money.

It's one of those games you play once, have a laugh, and never touch again once you realize it's basically a practical joke on the player

If you thought tennis with a golf club was bad, try bowling with a wedge of cheese

This game is wiisports for VR i bet thats the intention. The first game i didnt own already on meta quest +. Most games im not interested in on it but this one is super silly and fun sports party game.

Pros:
doesnt take itself seriously 
Best baseball game on vr i tried so far.
Cute good graphics
Fun selections of different balls for the 3 sports bowling baseball and tennis.
Accurate and easy controls, no frustration experienced like other tennis games.
Tons of training levels to master the unique gameplay 


Cons:
Limited to 3 sports
Requires Internet to play, please make this game offline too because what happens when the servers come down for good?

Make a sequel for quest 3 with more sports
well when i was playing for 1 hour and 30 minutes the game started getting boring, there are only 3 sports baseball, tennis and bowling if you like sports get it but gets boring also kinda expensive.

Update #4 - In case this has happened to anyone else, I'm happy to report that the "play with friends" aspect of Sports Scramble’s multi-player is once again working for us and its back to being our favorite app!  Turns out the problem was ours and not completely with the game. My son kept showing as off-line and the game didn’t see that he really was on-line and therefore we couldn’t invite each other to play.  We could however play in the regular multi-player but that meant we couldn’t chose the game and mode.
To fix it we finally figured out that he needed to log onto his Meta account on his PC’s browser where a few years back (when it was Oculus) he had selected the option to appear off-line, and completely forgot that.  So despite making the phone app show he was online, this was still out there.  Well now that he’s changed that to appear on-line everything is working again!

developer_response.body: We are working with Oculus to identify  an issue that is causing problems with multiplayer connectivity and instability across multiple games

reviews.review_description: Why can I not re-center my position. Tells me to move over to where my coffee table is and when trying to re-center my play space using the quest 2 oculus button does nothing and nothing in game to do this. Also deleted the app, re-did my guardian on oculus please fix and my rating would change to 4 stars and 5 if you bring back multiplayer.

First let me say the demo of this didn't impress me. The wacky "scramble" aspect might be good for small kids or a drunken party, but I like actual sports games. So I forgot about it for months. Then someone on Facebook recommended it and explained the "scramble" can be turned off, so I decided to give it another chance.

Well, it can be turned off but requires several steps, and I wish there was a way to turn it off permanently. I will NEVER want to play tennis with a fish for a racket. Even so, I played for about 10 minutes and felt sure I'd be asking for a refund. 

But then I came back and increased the difficulty levels. This makes it more of a serious game (despite the whimsical blobs in the audience). So I'd say if you have kids, this game on easy is great for them. But on harder levels adults can enjoy it too. 

The bowling is a waste of time if you have ForeVR Bowl, but weirdly Oculus has no actual tennis games apart from table tennis and Racket NX (which is quite intense and worth a purchase too).  This is actual tennis and quite fun. Then I tried the baseball, skeptically, because I didn't expect much. This turned out to be practically the best part of the app. It's a lot like Kinect Sports baseball, with you switching between batting and pitching (the computer runs the bases for you). Again, aside from the silly blobs you play with, this feels like real baseball. I was impressed. 

What I like best about the app is you can play it standing in one spot, and as someone with a very small space that's appreciated. As someone else said, it's been around awhile with no updates for just as long, which is a shame, I'd like to see new stuff added. I don't think this is worth full price, but a sale price is definitely worth it!
Maybe fun for younger kids

reviews.review_title: Liked it but now it's garbage
reviews.review_description:
don't want to put up with the aggravation. 
Multiplayer basically doesn'texist. Every time we try to use it, it  says "player offline.
Internet speed always tests good (average 230Gbps) I've read all the help articles, watched YouTube about issue, and even factory reset my quest. I used to plY this game regularly, but now it's  once a month or less to see if they've done anything about it
As others have already commented - Oculus denies any responsibility, and the developer does not respond at all.
HiGhLy AgGrAvAtInG ! !
Needs an update. It's not good enough to keep you engaged for a very long time.

Fun game but, for me, shots are too easy to make/very forgiving, and some shots are just not at all possible (i.e. lobs). Slicing is inaccurate and a little frustrating if you're looking for a realistic experience. This game is good for what it is, very creative and a great escape. But PLEASE tell me someone is developing a realistic tennis game, on a realistic court, with realistic movements, strokes, bounce, etc. How can there not be an app for this yet?

reviews.review_title: Really fun and worth every penny.
reviews.review_description:
Sports scramble is a game that is super fun and has tremendous replay value.  I'm not sure if it's just because of covid but I haven't had difficulties finding other players to match up with except during the most non-peak of hours.  

Like any other oculus exclusive, the graphics and controls are well polished.  This game is definitely worth buying imo.

Lot of Introduction and I brought to play with my wife, (we brought two Oculus Quest too) and the game had a lot of bugs into calibration and into time to play, I'm very disappointed, waiting a message Tha they are improving the game and fixing those bugs.

developer_response.body:
Hello Herculanoneto, Please let us know what issues you encountered by sending an email to support@armature.zendesk.com and we will troubleshoot and look into the issues.
~The Armature Team.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing sports scramble for a few days now and it is very entertaining, there are many different challenges that keep me playing.

Just paid for this game and I am very frustrated as it won’t even turn on. The demo works great and it seems like an awesome game. However, every time I load it, it just shows 3 dots and never turns on. I hope they fix this ASAP because it’s extremely frustrating!

developer_response.body: Hello Daveeychill, Generally when this type of issue occurs its due to a failed installation. Please uninstall and reinstall the game and try again. That should solve your issue. If you're still experiencing problems after that, please submit a ticket to support@armature.zendesk.com ~The Armature Team.
